steps.t: You should speak with Andreg to learn his plan.
Speak with Andreg at the Slade of Shadows.
The three altars can be found between the trees at the heart of the Slade of Shadows. Andreg instructed you to place the tokens of the gurach on the a…
Andreg is hiding near the Slade of Shadows. You should return to Andreg at once.
Andreg is lying among the shards of the Dutegelh. You should see if there is anything you can do to help Andreg.
The tokens of the gurach are upon the altars at the heart of the Slade of Shadows. Andreg instructed you to collect the tokens of the gurach and retur…
Andreg is lying mortally wounded among the shards of the Dutegelh at the heart of the Slade of Shadows. You should bring the tokens of the gurach to A…
